DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-22-2017 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. GREGROY L. MARTIN, TEL. NO. 1-926-420-5032 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendant Armando Benton's demurrer to the entirety of the complaint filed by plaintiff Gayle Martin is overruled in its entirety. Mr. Benton fails to explain how the description of the settlement contract in the complaint is inconsistent with the language of that contract and the court is not obligated to do its own analysis on that issue without any guidance from Mr. Benton. Answer to be filed by June 6, 2017. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/hk
